jobs.name: health-check
jobs.description: Check if the API is responding

jobs.name: disk-usage
jobs.description: Check disk usage on the controller

jobs.name: uptime-check
jobs.description: Report system uptime

jobs.name: ssl-cert-check
jobs.description: Check SSL certificate expiry

jobs.name: api-latency-test
jobs.description: Measure API response time

jobs.name: etl-extract
jobs.description: Extract data from source system

jobs.name: etl-transform
jobs.description: Transform extracted data using parallel workers

task.command: echo 'Transforming {{LAST_ETL_COUNT}} records with {{ETL_WORKERS}} workers...' && sleep 1 && echo 'Transform complete'

jobs.name: etl-validate
jobs.description: Run data quality checks on transformed data

task.command: echo 'Validating {{LAST_ETL_COUNT}} records...' && echo 'null_check: passed' && echo 'schema_check: passed' && echo 'Validation complete: 0 errors'

jobs.name: etl-load
jobs.description: Load validated data into warehouse

task.command: echo 'Loading data into warehouse...' && echo 'Load complete: {{LAST_ETL_COUNT}} records'

jobs.name: etl-failure-alert
jobs.description: Send alert when ETL pipeline fails

task.command: echo 'ETL ALERT: Pipeline failure detected. Notifying on-call team.'

jobs.name: deploy-staging
jobs.description: Deploy latest build to staging environment

task.command: echo 'Deploying to staging...' && sleep 2 && echo 'version=2.4.1' && echo 'Deploy complete'

jobs.name: deploy-smoke-test
jobs.description: Run smoke tests against staging deployment

jobs.name: deploy-production
jobs.description: Deploy to production (requires staging success + approval)

task.command: echo 'Deploying {{DEPLOY_VERSION}} to production...' && sleep 3 && echo 'Production deploy complete'

jobs.name: deploy-notify
jobs.description: Notify team after production deploy

jobs.name: db-backup
jobs.description: Full database backup with compression

task.command: echo 'Starting backup...' && sleep 1 && echo 'Backed up 42MB' && echo 'Backup complete'

jobs.name: log-rotate
jobs.description: Rotate and compress old log files

jobs.name: cache-purge
jobs.description: Clear stale cache entries

task.command: echo 'Purging cache entries older than 24h...' && echo 'Removed 847 entries (12MB freed)'

jobs.name: monthly-report
jobs.description: Generate monthly business metrics report

task.command: echo 'Generating report for {{REPORT_MONTH}}...' && echo 'Revenue: $142,300' && echo 'Users: 8,421' && echo 'Report saved to /reports/{{REPORT_MONTH}}.pdf'

jobs.name: quarterly-audit
jobs.description: Run quarterly compliance audit

task.command: echo 'Running audit checks...' && echo 'Access logs: OK' && echo 'Data retention: OK' && echo 'Encryption: OK' && echo 'Audit passed: 3/3 checks'

jobs.name: weekly-digest
jobs.description: Compile weekly metrics digest for stakeholders

task.command: echo 'Compiling weekly digest...' && echo 'Jobs run: 342' && echo 'Success rate: 98.5%' && echo 'Avg duration: 12s' && echo 'Digest sent to team'

jobs.name: sync-users
jobs.description: Sync user data from LDAP to local database

task.command: echo 'Connecting to LDAP...' && echo 'Fetched 234 users' && echo 'Updated: 12, Added: 3, Deactivated: 1' && echo 'Sync complete'

jobs.name: sync-inventory
jobs.description: Pull latest inventory from vendor API

jobs.name: sync-reconcile
jobs.description: Reconcile local data against vendor source of truth

task.command: echo 'Reconciling inventory...' && echo 'Matched: 1,847 items' && echo 'Mismatched: 3 items' && echo 'Reconciliation complete'

jobs.name: sync-notify
jobs.description: Send sync summary to data team

task.command: echo 'Data sync pipeline complete. Sending summary to data-team@example.com'
